summary: Phase 2 testing complete. All backend APIs pass (21/21). Frontend features tested: Global Search (Ctrl+K & button), Combobox components (City/Province/Payment Terms), Categories Manager with CRUD and drag-and-drop, Inactivity timeout indicator. One bug fix applied: reordered backend route for /categories/reorder to avoid conflict with /categories/{category_id}.

backend: GET /api/categories - Returns all categories with colors/IVA
frontend: Global search button visible in header
Global search dialog opens on button click
Search input works and shows results
Client form has Payment Terms combobox
Combobox shows saved options from database
Combobox allows adding new custom options
Category items show color, IVA%, description
New Category dialog with all fields

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js - Updated reorder API to use {positions: ...} wrapper
seed_data_creation: 11 default categories seeded in database, test options saved for cities/provinces/payment_terms
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully implemented. Backend uses SQLite. Route order matters in FastAPI - static routes like /categories/reorder must come BEFORE dynamic routes like /categories/{category_id}. Combobox component saves options via /api/options endpoint. Categories support sub-categories via parent_id field.

combobox_fields.city_combobox: Works with saved options and custom entry
combobox_fields.province_combobox: Works with saved options and custom entry
combobox_fields.payment_terms_combobox: Works with saved options and custom entry
combobox_fields.options_api: Works - saves and retrieves custom options

bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: FastAPI route order - /categories/{category_id} was catching 'reorder' as category_id
